response.original_title: 【母親×息子】の人気同人作品 待望の実写化!! 僕の母さんで、僕の好きな人。 木下凛々子
response.overview: Over 50,000 downloads in the series!! Original work by Siberian Mother Ski, "My Mom, My Favorite Person," is now fully adapted into live-action starring Madonna's leading actress, Ririko Kinoshita! Kaori Tachibana (Ririko Kinoshita), a housewife, has been worried about her son, Yuta, who has been acting strangely lately. One day, she witnesses her son masturbating while calling out her name!? Kaori is shaken, but she gently accepts her son's feelings for his mother as a woman... Includes the first and second installments of the series!!
response.title: The long-awaited live-action version of the popular doujin work of [mother x son]! ! My mother and my favorite person. Ririko Kinoshita
